question: The concept of 'quantum gravity' seeks to
options: Reconcile general relativity with quantum mechanics
Creating organisms with entirely artificial genomes that can self-replicate
A hypothetical point where AI surpasses human intelligence unpredictably
Total lifetime environmental exposures interact with the genome to determine health
answer: Reconcile general relativity with quantum mechanics

options: Information itself has physical reality — erasing information releases heat
Hypothetical force carriers of a dark electromagnetic force
A hypothetical point where AI surpasses human intelligence unpredictably
Creating organisms with entirely artificial genomes that can self-replicate
answer: Information itself has physical reality — erasing information releases heat
